query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by shortest distance first, and report both municipality and county.

1.description: resolve Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge areas filtered by Kristiansand municipality geometry

3.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality by kommunenummer

4.description: find buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas

5.description: calculate distance from each building to nearest storm-surge area

6.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

7.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending

9.description: join municipality and county names to the result
